requests.negative_prompt: readable claim text, proof, evidence, UI, logos, faces, numbers, subtitles
requests.output_expectation: One 9:16 mp4 or mov file, no baked subtitles, no readable text, suitable as a muted Remotion video_plate.
requests.proof_exclusion_policy: No proof, no evidence, no readable claims, and no subtitles; Remotion owns proof overlays and captions.
requests.remotion_integration_plan: Use only as a muted video_plate under Remotion-controlled proof overlays, subtitles, and final timing.
requests.handoff_instructions: User manually generates this on the chosen platform, downloads the file, returns or places it in the project, then Codex registers render.ai_video_candidates.
